eas_text: A civil authority has issued A LOCAL AREA EMERGENCY for the following counties or areas: Kerr, TX; at 6:50 AM on JUL 16, 2026 Effective until 8:50 AM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: Kerr County Flooding river expected to rise again within the hour. This is an extremely dangerous and life threatening situation. Stay away from low water crossings and the river area.
